name: landing
text:
Data Harmonization Tower
LIVE DEMO · DATA HARMONIZATION TOWER
Your data says Houston ISD
is 8 different customers.

It isn't. Pick a scenario below to watch Data Harmonization Tower ingest messy source files, resolve conflicts with AI, and produce a single trusted golden record — in under 2 minutes.

110
SAMPLE DEMO ROWS
→
11
GOLDEN RECORDS
90%
MERGE REDUCTION
$463K
ARR RECOVERED
<2min
TIME TO GOLDEN
1
INGEST
Load raw files
2
CANONICALIZE
Unify schema
3
SELF-HEAL
AI fixes issues
4
GOLDEN RECORD
Trusted master
5
BUSINESS IMPACT
Before vs. After
WITHOUT HARMONIZATION
Duplicate records across systems
Hidden revenue in phantom accounts
Zero-result searches (20% of queries)
Manual cleanup — weeks of analyst time
AFTER HARMONIZATION
Single trusted golden record per entity
Full ARR visibility, zero phantom splits
100% search recall — AI synonym resolution
Auto-healed in minutes, not weeks
SCENARIO 1 · LIFE SCIENCES
CATALOG
SKU / Product Catalog

7 demo inputs → 1 golden catalog

Supplier feeds across US, EU, and Nordic regions collide on the same antibodies and reagents, then search logs, pricing snapshots, datasheets, and a legacy catalog add even more contradictions. Watch the Tower deduplicate and unify them.

72
SAMPLE ROWS
6
GOLDEN RECORDS
4
ISSUE TYPES
US Antibodies Feed
CSV
EU Reagents Feed
CSV
Nordic Acquisition Catalog
CSV
Customer Search Logs
CSV
Pricing & Inventory Snapshot
CSV
Supplier Datasheets
JSON
Legacy Master Catalog
XLSX
Start SKU Demo
SCENARIO 2 · EDUCATION CRM
CRM
Imagine Learning / CRM

3 operational systems + district reference

Six reps entered Houston ISD eight different ways across Salesforce, NetSuite, and product telemetry. Reference enrichment then validates the merged district so legal names and enrollment stay consistent. Result: $463K in ARR scattered across phantom accounts that no one could find.

38
SAMPLE ROWS
8
HOUSTON VARIANTS
$463K
HIDDEN ARR
Salesforce CRM Export
CSV
Contract Billing — NetSuite
CSV
ProductTelemetry Usage
CSV
NCES District Reference
REF
Start CRM Demo

STAGE 5 - SEARCH IMPACT

This page proves why the harmonization pipeline matters. We compare raw product records from the incoming systems with the cleaned golden dataset so everyone can see how joining, cleaning, and standardizing the data changes the search experience.

Catalog Search Impact

See exactly which queries fail on raw data — and how golden records fix them.

Export to PIM / ERP
What this page does
How This Step Works
This final step proves the impact. A blank search shows every loaded record in this demo, and a filtered search shows every match with no hidden top-N cap.
WHAT COMES IN

The same user query is run against raw supplier rows, legacy catalog rows, datasheet titles, and against the final golden dataset.

WHAT CHANGES

Raw results are fragmented and inconsistent. Golden results are harmonized, joined, deduplicated, and easier to understand.

WHAT THIS PROVES

Better search coverage, clearer records, and a visible business reason for why the harmonization pipeline matters.

2

STAGE 1 - INGEST AND PROFILE

We start by loading the incoming supplier feeds, pricing tables, search logs, datasheets, and legacy catalog extracts. The system profiles each column for missing values, format conflicts, language mismatches, encoding problems, and duplicate clues before any cleaning begins.

Raw CRM Data Overview

Explore the three source feeds — every duplicate entity and naming variant exposed.

Begin Canonicalization
What this page does
How This Step Works
We start by showing the incoming files and profiling them before any cleaning happens. The file cards show the source counts, and the detail panel shows every row loaded into this demo view.
WHAT COMES IN

Supplier feeds, pricing snapshots, datasheet metadata, search logs, and legacy catalog rows.

CHECKS WE RUN

Missing values, language mixes, format problems, unit and currency differences, encoding issues, and duplicate clues.

WHAT GOES FORWARD

A profiled raw layer with issue lists, quality scores, and the evidence needed for cleaning, matching, and joining.

Source Network

Search Impact
STAGE 4 - BUILD THE GOLDEN DATASET

Cleaned supplier records are joined into trusted canonical entities. Supporting tables such as datasheets, pricing snapshots, and legacy references help validate and enrich the final record while lineage keeps a trace back to the source systems.

Golden Account Records

Canonical customer accounts — deduplicated, enriched, and ready for revenue intelligence.

Test Search Impact
What this page does
How This Step Works
This step shows how cleaned records from multiple sources are joined into one trusted golden dataset with lineage back to the original systems.
WHAT COMES IN

Cleaned supplier product records, plus supporting references from pricing, datasheets, and legacy catalog tables.

WORK WE DO

Join matching supplier rows into one canonical record, keep supplier lineage, and use supporting tables to validate and enrich the result.

WHAT GOES FORWARD

A searchable golden dataset that teams can trust for reporting, browsing, analytics, and downstream use.

Total ARR — Now Attributed
